message:
fix(gap-analysis): Use getActiveBullets for consistent filtering

Replace inline filter with getActiveBullets() from playbook.ts
to ensure consistent handling of deprecated bullets. The previous
filter missed checking `maturity !== "deprecated"`, which could
count deprecated-by-maturity bullets as active.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
